mapper.select: /* RoleMenuMapper.findPermissionsByRoleId */ SELECT R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , RM.CAN_READ AS canRead , RM.CAN_CREATE AS canCreate , RM.CAN_UPDATE AS canUpdate , RM.CAN_DELETE AS canDelete FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU M ON RM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE R.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC

/* RoleMenuMapper.findPermissionsByRoleCode */ SELECT R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , RM.CAN_READ AS canRead , RM.CAN_CREATE AS canCreate , RM.CAN_UPDATE AS canUpdate , RM.CAN_DELETE AS canDelete FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU M ON RM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE R.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC

/* RoleMenuMapper.selectAllMenusWithMapping */ SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , M.PARENT_MENU_ID AS parentMenuId , M.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , RM.ROLE_MENU_ID AS roleMenuId , COALESCE(RM.CAN_READ, 'N') AS canRead , COALESCE(RM.CAN_CREATE, 'N') AS canCreate , COALESCE(RM.CAN_UPDATE, 'N') AS canUpdate , COALESCE(RM.CAN_DELETE, 'N') AS canDelete FROM MENU M LEFT JOIN ROLE_MENU RM ON RM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND RM.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC
